Why Do Millions Trust LibertyAid?

  1. 1
    Security
    Instead of sharing sensitive medical information with multiple providers, fill out one simple, secure form in five minutes or less
  2. 2
    Rapid Response
    We'll match you with qualified healthcare assistance programs from our network of 300+ providers who will help address your needs.
  3. 3
    Support
    We provide ongoing support with free healthcare advocacy, billing assistance, and personalized recommendations to help you save on medical costs.

Medicare Advantage Veteran Plans
April 15, 2025 April 15, 2025 Liz Gray Uncategorized Leave a comment

Veteran Medicare Advantage Plans: A Friendly Guide for Veterans and Families Medicare can be confusing, especially for our veterans who already have VA or TRICARE benefits. In this post, we’ll explain Veteran Medicare Advantage Plans in simple terms. Our goal is to help you understand what they are, how they work with VA and TRICARE,...Continue reading→

Medicare Advantage PFFS Plans
April 15, 2025 April 15, 2025 Andrew Vieira Uncategorized Leave a comment

Understanding PFFS Medicare Advantage Plans Medicare can be confusing, and one option you may have heard of is the Private Fee-for-Service (PFFS) Medicare Advantage plan. If this term is new to you, you’re not alone! In this friendly guide, we’ll explain what PFFS plans are, how they work (including how doctors accept or decline them),...Continue reading→

Contact With Us

We are an independent entity and are not affiliated with or endorsed by the United States government or the federal Medicare program. Our offerings may not include every plan available in your area, and the information we provide is limited to the plans we do offer. For a complete overview of your options, please visit Medicare.gov or call 1-800-MEDICARE. Health insurance policies listed on LibertyAid.co are facilitated through the licensed entity: Guru Marketing, Inc.
